pullRequest.title: [fix] treeify: Allow accounts with components starting with a number
pullRequest.body:
Account components may begin with [0-9], which was disallowed

Added a test case

Resolves #387

I noticed that the `DEFAULT_PATTERN` currently allows underscore and single quote in account names, which are disallowed by the spec/documentation. Not sure if that is intentional or should be changed to strictly conform.

pullRequest.title: ci: enable python 3.14
pullRequest.body:
close https://github.com/beancount/beancount/issues/984

IMO, refcount is internal details of cpython can we should not has assertion on it
